devloop_conventions: explicitly references docs/CONTEXT.md for domain vocabulary
explicitly references docs/adr/ for structural decisions
uses Task tool subagent_type=Explore for the codebase walk (not exhaustive reading)
defined output shape (modules, adjacent modules, open questions, relevant ADRs)
named follow-up paths into architecture-review / feature-workflow / bug-fix-workflow / discover
offers to add new map terms to CONTEXT.md (same discipline as discover mode domain)

follow_ups: start a feature in mapped area → devloop:feature-workflow
fix a bug surfaced by the map → devloop:bug-fix-workflow
write map terms into knowledge base → propose CONTEXT.md additions

boundaries.produces: a high-level map of modules, interfaces, callers, and adjacent modules using CONTEXT.md vocabulary
boundaries.does_not_produce: refactor proposals (architecture-review), feature plans (discover + plan-writing), bug diagnoses (diagnose)
